title: Regolamenti dwar Credit Institutions and Financial Institutions (Payment Accounts)
title_en: Regolamenti dwar Credit Institutions and Financial Institutions (Payment Accounts)
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/376.8/mlt, expression eli/sl/376.8/20240223/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
CREDIT INSTITUTIONS AND FINANCIAL
INSTITUTIONS (PAYMENT ACCOUNTS)

[ L.S.376.08

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 376.08
REGOLAMENTI DWAR CREDIT INSTITUTIONS
AND FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (PAYMENT
ACCOUNTS)
7 ta’ Diċembru, 2016;
18 ta’ Ġunju, 2017 *;
31 ta’ Ottubru, 2018 †
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 411 tal-2016 , kif emendati bl-Avviżi Legali 324 u 354
tal-2018 u 33 tal-2024.

Dawn ir regolamenti ġew ippubblikat bl-Ilslien Ingliż biss.

* Ara r-regolament 1(6) tal-Avviż Legali 411 tal-2017.
† Ara l-Avviż Legali 354 tal-2018.

1
